references.text: Hansen, B. 1972. The genus Balanophora: a taxonomic monograph. Dansk Botanisk Arkiv 28: 1-188.
Hansen, B. 1976. Balanophoraceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 7: 783-805
Pelser, PB, DN Tandang & JF Barcelona. 2014. Balanophora coralliformis (Balanophoraceae), a new species from Mt. Mingan, Luzon, Philippines. Phytotaxa 170: 291-295

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 15 April 2025

species.citation: Blume , Enum. Pl. Javae (1827) 87 ; Hansen, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1976) 801. = Balanophora micrantha Warb. , Fragm. Fl. Philipp. (1905) 169 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 118. = Balanophora subglobosa Elmer , LPB 5 (1913) 1660 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 118. = Balanophora fawcettii Elmer , LPB 5 (1913) 1659.
species.distribution: Africa, Andaman Isls, Cambodia, China, India, Indian Ocean, Java, Laos, Lesser Sunda Isls, Madagascar, Malay Peninsula, Myanmar, New Guinea, Nicobar Isls, Pacific Ocean, Philippines, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Thailand, Vietnam. CEBU (photos), LEYTE, LUZON: Benguet, Laguna, Quezon, MINDANAO: Lanao del Sur, MINDORO.

species.citation: Barcelona, Tandang & Pelser , Phytotaxa 170 (2014) 291; Type: Barcelona 3895 with Pelser & Tandang (PNH, holo; CHR, K, PUH, US, iso), Luzon: Aurora, San Luis, Mt Mingan, 23-Feb-2014.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. LUZON: Aurora, Benguet (photo), MINDANAO: Misamis Oriental (photos), ?MINDORO (photos).

species.citation: J.R.Forst. & G.Forst. , Char. Gen. Pl., 2nd Ed. (1775) 100 ; Hansen, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1976) 794. ssp. fungosa. Distribution: Australia, Borneo, India, Java, Malay Peninsula, Myanmar, New Caledonia, New Guinea, Pacific Ocean, Philippines, Ryukyu Isls, Solomon Isls, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Taiwan, Vietnam. LUZON: Bulacan, Rizal, PALAWAN. Notes: Forests. 0-1000m. Native. ssp. indica (Arn.) B.Hansen, Dansk Bot. Ark. 28 (1972) 100; Hansen, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1976) 794. = Balanophora decurrens Fawc., Trans. Linn. Soc. London, Bot. 2 (1886) 234; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 118. Distribution: Australia, China, India, Laos, Malay Peninsula, Myanmar, Pacific Ocean, Philippines, Sri Lanka, Sumatra, Thailand, Vietnam. LUZON, MINDORO (photos), PALAWAN. Notes: (150-)500-2600m. Native.
species.distribution: Australia, Borneo, China, India, Java, Laos, Malay Peninsula, Myanmar, New Caledonia, New Guinea, Pacific Ocean, Philippines, Ryukyu Isls, Solomon Isls, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Taiwan, Thailand, Vietnam. CEBU (photos), LUZON: Bataan (photos), Bulacan, Rizal, MINDANAO: Bukidnon (photos), MINDORO, PALAWAN.

species.citation: Schltr. , Bot. Jahrb. Syst. 50 (1913) 68 ; Hansen, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1976) 798. = Balanophora incarnata Elmer , LPB 5 (1913) 1661 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 118.
species.distribution: Borneo, Malay Peninsula, New Guinea, Philippines. CAMIGUIN, CEBU (photos), LUZON: Apayao (photos), Aurora (photos), Bataan, Benguet, Pampanga, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Bukidnon, Cotabato (photos), Davao de Oro (photos), Davao del Sur, Lanao del Sur, Misamis Oriental (photos), MINDORO, PANAY (photos).
